## Contract Impact

- Does this change the generated `.fusion/config.yaml` workspace contract or the checked-in `templates/config.yaml` baseline?
- Does this change hook wiring, `.claude/settings.example.json`, or any host-local `.claude/settings.json` / `.claude/settings.local.json` behavior?
- Should `rust/crates/fusion-cli/tests/repo_contract.rs` or other release contract gates change together with this request?
